asset_coverage.audio_stub_note: All 25 audio files (17 SFX + 8 BGM) have identical 431-byte ID3v2.3 stub content — valid file headers but no actual audio data. AudioManager will load without crash but produce silence.

runtime_screenshots.observations: 8x8 tile grid fully visible with 4 distinct tile color variants (blue, green, orange/coral, beige). Black background. No HUD or UI layer visible. Tile colors differ between screenshot 1 and 2, confirming game logic (randomization or initialization) is active.

Same grid layout after 8s, different tile arrangement — confirms board is live and rendering. UI/HUD still not visible. Tile placeholder art (solid color blocks with black borders) confirmed rendering correctly via Cocos Creator draw calls.

visual_assessment.ui_notes: HUD and button UI not visible in screenshots — likely requires user interaction to enter game scene, or GameplayScene is loading directly without Menu scene. The Cocos Creator splash shows on very first load (captured in prior session). Current screenshots show direct game board rendering.
visual_assessment.background_notes: Background is solid black — chapter background sprites exist on disk (14 backgrounds confirmed) but are not rendering in the current game state screenshot

code_gaps.notes: HUD/UI layer (step counter, score, buttons) not visible in screenshots. Likely scene flow issue: game loads directly into puzzle board without triggering UI initialization, or UI nodes are positioned off-screen. Gameplay tile rendering is confirmed working.
14 chapter background PNGs confirmed on disk but background layer shows solid black in screenshots. Background sprite binding may require chapter selection flow to be triggered.

asset_gaps.notes: obstacle_weed.png absent from sprites/tiles/. Runtime will fallback or show blank for weed obstacle type.
obstacle_wooden_crate.png absent from sprites/tiles/. 5 of 7 obstacle types present (ice_block, chain_lock, portal, single_path, spreading).
obstacle_water_current.png absent from sprites/tiles/. 3 obstacle types missing total.
VFX frames directory is empty (resources/effects/frames/ has 0 files). tile-disappear, wave ripple, light-chain lightning, pierce shimmer, cascade glow all run tween fallbacks — gameplay unblocked.

chapter1/ through chapter6/ subdirectories in sprites/tiles/ are empty — final illustrated tile art not yet delivered. Runtime using generic tile_01–tile_20.png placeholders which are confirmed present and rendering.

All 25 audio files (17 SFX + 8 BGM) are 431-byte identical stubs with valid ID3 headers but no audio content. Files load without crash but produce silence. Audio is the highest-priority real content gap.
pierce badge shares windmill.png, cascade badge shares wave.png — temporary mappings. 4 badge files cover 5 special types. Dedicated art not yet delivered.

prior_session_comparison.note: Prior session screenshots (asset-binding-qa-initial-load.png) showed only Cocos Creator splash screen — game had not initialized. Current session (5s and 8s wait) successfully captures the live game board with tile grid rendering, confirming the build is functional and asset binding is working.

verdict_rationale: Canvas renders correctly. 8x8 tile board with 4 color variants confirms tile placeholder art binding is functional. 20 generic tile PNGs present and rendering. 30 UI sprites, 25 audio stubs, and 5/7 obstacle sprites all on disk. Gameplay is unblocked by placeholder tiles. Missing assets (3 obstacle sprites, VFX frames, chapter-specific tile art, real audio content) are all degraded/minor gaps that do not block the playable vertical slice. Audio stub files (silent but non-crashing) are a moderate gap requiring real audio delivery.
